title: Visual Aids Centre | Boutique Eye Care
heading: The Gift of Sight
description: State-of-the-art Exclusive Laser Vision Correction Center in South Delhi. 250,000+ procedures performed, specializing in LASIK surgery in Delhi. Call us at 011-46108181.

Read More WaveLight Plus InnovEyes Advance Ray Tracing Lasik A unique 3D model (EyeVatar) is created using AI which corrects the minutest imperfections best suited for complex visual problems. A sitemap diagnostic tool is used to create a virtual 3D model which results in better than 6/6 vision in most cases. Read More Topography Guided Lasik Completely customised as per the minutest details of your eye especially for correction of high cylindrical prescriptions. Read More Femto Lasik Proven to be the most patient friendly procedure giving precise visual outcomes and a quick, hassle free recovery process. Read More Trans-PRK Breakthrough precision of No Touch laser technology best suited for thin corneas and for individuals in close combat professions. Read More Specialised Ophthalmic Care Keratoconus Management Read More Dry Eyes Treatment Read More Pediatric Eye Care Read More Our Story Founded in the year 1980, Visual Aids Centre became the first eye centre to introduce Lasik surgery in delhi in the year 1999. Till date, Visual Aids Centre is the only exclusive Laser Vison Correction centre of India. In the past 26 years, we have performed more than 250,000 Laser Vision Correction procedures which is the highest number of procedures performed by any private eye centre in India. As first time visitors to India, we could not have received a better welcome than in the hands of the Visual Aids family. The calm demeanour and the gentleness with which they take care of patients is noteworthy. We felt very much at home and my condition didn’t seem so worrying at all. I will definitely refer to Visual Aids Centre if someone asks me where the best eye treatment in India is, without hesitation. VIVEK GUPTA Environment is very good . All members are very friendly and helping to improve your life in new way. AAMREEN BANO Very good experience. I got vision in both eye. Very good hospitality, polite staff. MAYANK AGARWAL It is a pleasant experience to get treated by Dr V.Bakshi. RAJMEET SINGH ARORA Good and quick service. RESHMA KUMARI I think this is the best hospital to recover our eyes. STUTI JAIN Excellent treatment, very helpful. We Are Here For You We fully understand that opting for Laser vision correction is a life changing decision and it is quintessential for you to know about all the options you have and what you should expect in terms of outcomes. Please note that everyone is NOT a suitable candidate for these procedures and we need to pick and choose the right candidate on the basis of a scan to mitigate all potential risks and post-op complications. 15-20% of patients are politely refused by us due to either an underlying eye condition or unsuitable eye parameters. Since we are the only dedicated laser vision correction eye centre of India, we offer all forms of laser vision correction procedures which may or may not be available elsewhere. As a gesture of goodwill, we offer all our patients a free of cost suitability scan and consultation to check for their eligibility for these procedures.
